config.content: You are building a professional resume. Produce clean, complete output. Do not leave placeholders.

config.system: Organize the user input into resume sections: Summary, Experience, Education, Skills. Output structured prose only, no HTML. Be specific — use the exact details given.

Convert the resume content into a single self-contained HTML file with inline CSS. Clean typography, white background, subtle section dividers. Output ONLY valid HTML — no explanation, no markdown fences.
